# WebContainer API snapshot

`api-1.6.4.js` is a reviewed, single-file ES module snapshot of
`@webcontainer/api` 1.6.4. It is served from this repository so the tutorial
runtime does not execute an integrity-checked entry module that then imports
unchecked CDN modules.

- Upstream package: `@webcontainer/api@1.6.4`
- Snapshot source: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@webcontainer/api@1.6.4/+esm`
- Downloaded source SHA-256: `e40a6c0f3bf1b12e573c2f39b89058ba4479bd7fee2a57890c51ec03d644ac42`
- Checked-in file SHA-256 (including the final newline):
  `0a8c0e2e1efdb3b67bfaf67ddcc393fb4cf14a8a2fd89c5e223065d74a98ed0e`
- License: MIT; see `LICENSE` in this directory.

Refresh this snapshot only in a dedicated dependency update. Verify the exact
package version and downloaded digest, review the generated module for new
network or storage behavior, update both hashes above, and run the tutorial
runtime and WCAG suites before committing it.
